mapper.sql: id, patient_id, scheduling_id, case_number, real_name, gender, card_number, birthdate, age, age_type, home_address, visit_date, noon, deptment_id, employee_id, regist_level_id, settle_category_id, is_book, regist_method, regist_money, visit_state, check_in_time, call_status, called_time, answered_time, call_round, queue_position
mapper.select: SELECT FROM register WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT r.id, r.patient_id, r.scheduling_id, r.case_number, r.real_name, r.gender, r.card_number, r.birthdate, r.age, r.age_type, r.home_address, r.visit_date, r.noon, r.deptment_id, r.employee_id, r.regist_level_id, r.settle_category_id, r.is_book, r.regist_method, r.regist_money, r.visit_state, r.check_in_time, r.call_status, r.called_time, r.answered_time, r.call_round, upm.relation AS relation, ds.modify_remark AS schedule_modify_remark, ds.status AS schedule_status FROM register r INNER JOIN user_patient_managed upm ON upm.patient_id = r.patient_id LEFT JOIN doctor_schedule ds ON ds.id = r.scheduling_id WHERE upm.user_id = #{userId} AND r.visit_state != 4 ORDER BY r.visit_date DESC NULLS LAST, r.id DESC
SELECT FROM register WHERE visit_state = 1 AND check_in_time IS NULL ORDER BY visit_date ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE register SET visit_state = 7 WHERE visit_state = 1 AND visit_date < #{deadline} AND check_in_time IS NULL
UPDATE register SET visit_state = 7 WHERE id = #{id} AND visit_state = 1 AND check_in_time IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) FROM register
SELECT last_value + CASE WHEN is_called THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM register_id_seq
SELECT setval( pg_get_serial_sequence('register', 'id'), COALESCE((SELECT MAX(id) FROM register), 1), true )
mapper.update: UPDATE register SET patient_id = #{patientId}, scheduling_id = #{schedulingId}, real_name = #{realName}, gender = #{gender}, card_number = #{cardNumber}, birthdate = #{birthdate}, age = #{age}, age_type = #{ageType}, home_address = #{homeAddress}, visit_date = #{visitDate}, noon = #{noon}, deptment_id = #{deptmentId}, employee_id = #{employeeId}, regist_level_id = #{registLevelId}, settle_category_id = #{settleCategoryId}, is_book = #{isBook}, regist_method = #{registMethod}, regist_money = #{registMoney}, visit_state = #{visitState} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE register SET visit_state = #{visitState} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE register SET visit_state = #{visitState} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE register SET check_in_time = #{checkInTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE register SET queue_position = #{queuePosition} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: WITH cur AS ( SELECT employee_id, DATE(visit_date) AS d, queue_position, check_in_time FROM register WHERE id = #{id} ) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM register r, cur WHERE r.id <> #{id} AND r.visit_state = 1 AND r.check_in_time IS NOT NULL AND r.employee_id = cur.employee_id AND DATE(r.visit_date) = cur.d AND ( (r.queue_position IS NOT NULL AND cur.queue_position IS NOT NULL AND r.queue_position < cur.queue_position) OR ( (r.queue_position IS NULL OR cur.queue_position IS NULL) AND r.check_in_time < cur.check_in_time ) )
mapper.delete: UPDATE register SET visit_state = 4 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT case_number FROM register WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM register WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND DATE(visit_date) = #{visitDate} AND check_in_time IS NOT NULL AND call_status IN (0, 3) AND NOT (call_status = 3 AND call_round >= 2) ORDER BY queue_position ASC NULLS LAST, check_in_time ASC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE register SET call_status = 1, called_time = #{now}, call_round = call_round + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND call_status IN (0, 3) AND call_round < 2
UPDATE register SET call_status = 2, answered_time = #{now}, visit_state = 2 WHERE id = #{id} AND call_status = 1
UPDATE register SET call_status = 3 WHERE id = #{id} AND call_status IN (0, 1)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM register WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND DATE(visit_date) = #{visitDate} AND call_status = 1 ORDER BY called_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM register WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND DATE(visit_date) = #{visitDate} AND called_time IS NOT NULL ORDER BY called_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM register WHERE DATE(visit_date) = #{visitDate} AND call_status = 1 ORDER BY called_time DESC

SELECT FROM register WHERE deptment_id = #{departmentId} AND DATE(visit_date) = #{visitDate} AND visit_state = 1 AND check_in_time IS NOT NULL AND call_status IN (0, 1, 3) ORDER BY queue_position ASC NULLS LAST, check_in_time ASC

SELECT FROM register WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND DATE(visit_date) = #{visitDate} AND check_in_time IS NOT NULL AND visit_state = 1 AND call_status IN (0, 1, 3) ORDER BY queue_position ASC NULLS LAST, check_in_time ASC
SELECT FROM register WHERE call_status = 1 AND called_time < #{deadline} ORDER BY called_time ASC
